title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez in Behalf of the Municipality of Los Baños to Enter Into and Sign a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Department of Social Welfare and Development DSWD) Through Its Regional Field Office Iv-a Represented by the Regional Director for the Provision of Social Amelioration Measures to the Most Affected Residents of the Municipality of Los Baños in View of the Enhance Community Quarantine Due to Covid-19. (AUTHOR(S): Councilor(s) Joseph
